name: Insurance & Takaful
copTitle: Personal Data Protection Code of Practice (Insurance and Takaful) 2022

security.encryption: All health data encrypted at rest and in transit
deltaFromBaseline: All health data encrypted at rest and in transit
Role-based access controls for health/medical data
Telematics data limited to operational + 2 years

sensitiveData.specialCategories: Health data for underwriting; genetic data; biometric authentication
sensitiveData.protectionLevel: Genetic data access limited to named officers; biometric not cross-used for underwriting
sensitiveData.storageSegregation: Enhanced access controls for health/genetic data
deltaFromBaseline: Genetic data access limited to named officers only
Biometric authentication data cannot be cross-used for underwriting
Health data for underwriting requires enhanced protections

disclosure.consentRequirements: Anti-fraud sharing per privacy notice; reinsurance disclosure documented
deltaFromBaseline: Anti-fraud data sharing with MTA/PIAM per privacy notice
Loss adjuster disclosure for claims assessment
Dual reporting to Commissioner AND BNM
Significant security incidents require BNM notification

provisions.title: Underwriting Data
provisions.summary: Health data requires enhanced protections; genetic data most restricted

provisions.title: Anti-Fraud Data Sharing
provisions.summary: MTA/PIAM sharing per privacy notice; fraud flagging protocols

provisions.title: Telematics & UBI
provisions.summary: Separate consent from policy; DPIA required; operational + 2yr retention
